title: Very simply optimized
body:
### Very Simply optimized
A modpack focused on **Pure** Performance.
Includes nothing else. Only has 10 mods.

### mods:

1. **[Immediately Fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)**
2. **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)**
3. **[Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)**
4. **[Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)**
5. **[Enhanced Block entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)**
6. **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**
7. **[Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)**
8. **[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)**
9. **[Modern fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)**
10. **[Ferrite core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)**
